title: fluvialis minor
intro: Fluvialis minor, also known as Lesser Marshwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues and digestive problems. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for overall health. Fluvialis minor can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it has been used to treat symptoms such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as to support liver and kidney function.
